name: Getting a womb tattoo
description:
You get a womb tattoo that can change your behavior, thoughts, and even physical appearance.

Content Warning: Dubcon/Noncon, Body modification, Lactation, Breeding, Loss of Intelligence

Intro 1: Consensually getting a womb tattoo

Intro 2: Forced to get a womb tattoo (you can still choose which one you get)

The bot has a bad habit of speaking for you and mixing up tattoo effects sorry...
